subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the servant unto him who hath emigrated unto God, attained unto the precincts of Paradise, and was among them that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی العبد الی الذی هاجر الی الله و ورد بقعه الفردوس و کان من
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @thankfulness; gratitude, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @knowledge; recognition of God
